tool_input.command:
jq -r --arg sec "s29" '
  . as $root |
  ([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s |
  if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND"
  else "# " + $root.title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content
  end
' /home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json

jq -r --arg sec "s29" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json

jq -r --arg sec "s29" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json && echo "---" && jq -r --arg sec "s20" '([.sections[]? | select(.id == $sec)][0]) as $s | if $s == null then "SECTION_NOT_FOUND" else .title + " > " + $s.title + "\n" + $s.content end' knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json

python3 -c "
import json
files = [
    ('knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json', 's29'),
    ('knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json', 's20'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-transaction-management-handler.json', 's7'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's4'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's5'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's6'),
]
for filepath, sec_id in files:
    try:
        with open(filepath) as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        sections = {s['id']: s for s in data.get('sections', [])}
        s = sections.get(sec_id)
        if s:
            print(f'=== {filepath} : {sec_id} ===')
            print(f'# {data[\"title\"]} > {s[\"title\"]}')
            print(s['content'])
            print('=== END ===')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error: {e}')
"

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

files = [
    ('knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-database.json', 's29'),
    ('knowledge/component/libraries/libraries-universal-dao.json', 's20'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-transaction-management-handler.json', 's7'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's4'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's5'),
    ('knowledge/component/handlers/handlers-loop-handler.json', 's6'),
]
base = '/home/tie303177/work/nabledge/work1/.claude/skills/nabledge-6/'
for filepath, sec_id in files:
    try:
        with open(base + filepath) as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        sections = {s['id']: s for s in data.get('sections', [])}
        s = sections.get(sec_id)
        if s:
            print(f'=== {filepath} : {sec_id} ===')
            print(f'# {data["title"]} > {s["title"]}')
            print(s['content'])
            print('=== END ===')
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'Error reading {filepath}: {e}')
PYEOF
